matches.summary: Total US consumer spending on video games jumped 12% to $5.3 billion in March 2026, while first quarter spending rose by 5% year-on-year to $14.6 billion.
matches.title: US hardware sales rose 69% in March 2026 following strong Switch 2 performance | US Monthly Charts

matches.summary: New venture capital firm Firstpoint VC has launched with a €50 million fund to invest in AI-driven gaming and entertainment startups.
